scenarios.label: Patient First Calm Check
scenarios.expected_focus: Start by addressing the patient directly before shifting to other responders.
scenarios.message_text: I fell but I can still answer.

scenarios.label: Bystander Takeover After No Response
scenarios.expected_focus: Switch from patient-first to bystander-directed urgent guidance.
scenarios.message_text: He is not waking up and I need to help him.

scenarios.label: Bystander Testing Flow
scenarios.expected_focus: Assume a bystander is available so the MVP can demo guided assistance.
scenarios.message_text: I am next to the patient and can follow instructions.

scenarios.label: CPR Guidance Continuation
scenarios.expected_focus: Do not rerun reasoning when the system is just continuing an active guidance script.

scenarios.label: Abnormal Breathing Update
scenarios.expected_focus: Trigger reasoning refresh when a critical new breathing fact arrives.
